info.title: PreciseFP API
info.description: PreciseFP provides a set of RESTful APIs that allow you to interact with your data, build custom workflows, and easily integrate your current tech stack with PreciseFP's tools and services. PreciseFP is a data gathering and client onboarding platform for financial advisors.

tags.name: Pipeline Stages
tags.description: Manage pipeline stages for client workflows

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Manage webhook subscriptions for real-time event notifications

get.description: Retrieve a list of client and prospect accounts. Supports sorting, pagination, and search by email.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field and direction. Prefix with '-' for descending order (e.g., '-id', '-created_at').

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query string to filter accounts (e.g., by email address).

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter accounts by type.

post.description: Create a new client or prospect account.

get.description: Retrieve a specific client or prospect account by its ID.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the account.

put.description: Update an existing client or prospect account.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the account.

delete.description: Delete a client or prospect account.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the account.

put.description: Transition an account to a specified pipeline stage.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the account.

pipeline_stage_id.description: The ID of the pipeline stage to move the account to.

200.description: Account moved to pipeline stage successfully.

get.description: Retrieve a list of form engagements. Can be filtered by account.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field and direction. Prefix with '-' for descending order (e.g., '-created_at').

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Filter engagements by account ID.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: Filter engagements by template ID.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter engagements by status.

post.description: Create a new form engagement to send a form template to a client or prospect.

get.description: Retrieve a specific form engagement by its ID.

parameters.name: engagementId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the form engagement.

post.description: Mark a form engagement as closed. This may be required before retrieving the engagement data.

parameters.name: engagementId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the form engagement.

get.description: Retrieve the submitted data from a completed or closed form engagement. Each item in the response contains a dataset ID, field title, and field value.

parameters.name: engagementId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the form engagement.

get.description: Download a PDF copy of a completed form engagement.

parameters.name: engagementId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the form engagement.

200.description: PDF file of the form engagement.

get.description: Retrieve a list of PDF engagements.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field and direction. Prefix with '-' for descending order.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Filter engagements by account ID.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: Filter engagements by PDF template ID.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter engagements by status.

post.description: Create a new PDF engagement for a client or prospect.

get.description: Retrieve a specific PDF engagement by its ID.

parameters.name: engagementId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the PDF engagement.

get.description: Retrieve the submitted data from a completed PDF engagement.

parameters.name: engagementId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the PDF engagement.

get.description: Download the completed PDF file for a PDF engagement.

parameters.name: engagementId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the PDF engagement.

get.description: Retrieve a list of available form templates.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

get.description: Retrieve a specific form template by its ID.

parameters.name: templateId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the template.

get.description: Retrieve a list of available PDF templates.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

get.description: Retrieve a specific PDF template by its ID.

parameters.name: templateId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the PDF template.

get.description: Retrieve a list of available pipeline stages.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

get.description: Retrieve a specific pipeline stage by its ID.

parameters.name: stageId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the pipeline stage.

get.description: Retrieve a list of registered webhook subscriptions.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

post.description: Register a new webhook subscription for real-time event notifications.

get.description: Retrieve a specific webhook subscription by its ID.

parameters.name: webhookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the webhook.

parameters.name: webhookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the webhook.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Contact PreciseFP support to obtain API access credentials.

pipeline_stage_id.description: ID of the current pipeline stage.

pipeline_stage_name.description: Name of the current pipeline stage.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the account was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the account was last updated.

type.description: The type of account to create.

total.description: Total number of accounts matching the query.

limit.description: The limit used in the request.

offset.description: The offset used in the request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the form engagement.

template_id.description: ID of the form template used.

template_name.description: Name of the form template used.

contact_id.description: ID of the primary contact for this engagement.

secondary_contact_id.description: ID of the secondary contact for this engagement.

authentication_method.description: Authentication method used for the engagement.

send_engagement_email.description: Whether a new engagement email was sent.

enable_reminders.description: Whether periodic email reminders are enabled.

enable_thank_you_email.description: Whether a thank you email is sent upon completion.

url.description: URL for the client to access the form engagement.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the engagement was created.

completed_at.description: Timestamp when the engagement was completed.

opened_at.description: Timestamp when the engagement was first opened by the client.

closed_at.description: Timestamp when the engagement was closed.

template_id.description: ID of the form template to use.

account_id.description: ID of the account to create the engagement for.

send_engagement_email.description: Whether to send a new engagement email to the client.

enable_reminders.description: Whether to enable periodic email reminders.

enable_thank_you_email.description: Whether to send a thank you email upon completion.

total.description: Total number of form engagements matching the query.

limit.description: The limit used in the request.

offset.description: The offset used in the request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PDF engagement.

template_id.description: ID of the PDF template used.

template_name.description: Name of the PDF template used.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the engagement was created.

completed_at.description: Timestamp when the engagement was completed.

template_id.description: ID of the PDF template to use.

account_id.description: ID of the account to create the engagement for.

total.description: Total number of PDF engagements matching the query.

limit.description: The limit used in the request.

offset.description: The offset used in the request.

dataset_id.description: UUID identifying the dataset this field belongs to.

value.description: The submitted value for the field.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the template was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the template was last updated.

limit.description: The limit used in the request.

offset.description: The offset used in the request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PDF template.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the template was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the template was last updated.

limit.description: The limit used in the request.

offset.description: The offset used in the request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the pipeline stage.

order.description: Order position of the stage in the pipeline.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the pipeline stage was created.

limit.description: The limit used in the request.

offset.description: The offset used in the request.

url.description: The URL to send webhook notifications to.

event.description: The event type to subscribe to.

active.description: Whether the webhook is currently active.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the webhook was created.

url.description: The URL to send webhook notifications to.

event.description: The event type to subscribe to.

limit.description: The limit used in the request.

offset.description: The offset used in the request.

BadRequest.description: Bad request. The request body or parameters are invalid.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized. The Bearer token is missing, invalid, or expired.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.
